steps.title: Expand the right side to match the form of the left side
steps.content:
Distribute $ry^4$ through the parentheses on the right side:
$$ry^4(15y - 9) = 15ry^5 - 9ry^4$$
Now both sides are in expanded form:
Left: $90y^5 - 54y^4$
Right: $15ry^5 - 9ry^4$

steps.title: Match coefficients and solve for r
steps.content:
For two polynomials to be equivalent, coefficients of matching powers of $y$ must be equal.
Looking at the $y^5$ terms:
$$15r = 90$$
Divide both sides by 15:
$$r = \frac{90}{15} = 6$$
